name: Supabase document insertion, storage, and AI retrieval
description: Fetches a document from Google Drive, stores its content in Supabase via SQL, and uses Claude AI to answer questions about the stored documents. Adapted from n8n's Supabase insertion/upsertion/retrieval workflow.

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for fetching documents

supabaseKey.description: Supabase connection key for database operations

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for status notifications

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for operation results

driveFileId.description: Google Drive file ID of the document to ingest

tableName.description: Supabase table name for document storage

question.description: Optional question to ask about the stored documents

steps.name: Get document metadata from Google Drive
Export file content from Google Drive
Prepare document content for Supabase insertion
Build SQL insert query for Supabase
Build Claude prompt for document Q&A
Build Slack Block Kit status message
